title: Web Directory Scanning IP Clustering (Anomaly Detection)
description: Clusters IPs performing directory enumeration by counting distinct 404-generating paths. A high number of unique 404 paths from a single IP indicates systematic directory/file scanning using tools like dirb, gobuster, or ffuf.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Load Balancer Access Logs') and 'Response Code' = '404' | stats count as total_404s, distinctcount('Request URL') as unique_paths by 'Client IP', 'User Agent' | sort -unique_paths | where unique_paths > 20
